all.en: Welcome to our company and congratulations on becoming a valued team member.
all.zh: 歡迎加入本公司，並恭喜您成為珍貴的團隊一員。

all.en: This handbook outlines the policies and expectations that guide our workplace.
all.zh: 本手冊概述指引本職場運作的政策與期待。

all.en: Please read it carefully and refer back to it as your tenure continues.
all.zh: 請仔細閱讀並於任職期間隨時參考。

all.en: Our standard work week consists of forty hours over five business days.
all.zh: 標準工作週為五個工作日合計四十小時。

all.en: Core working hours are between ten in the morning and four in the afternoon.
all.zh: 核心工作時段為上午十點至下午四點。

all.en: Outside core hours, schedules may be adjusted with manager approval.
all.zh: 核心時段以外，可於主管核可後調整時程。

all.en: Hybrid arrangements typically include two on-site days per week.
all.zh: 混合工作模式一般包含每週兩天到辦公室。

all.en: Employees accrue fifteen days of paid annual leave each calendar year.
all.zh: 員工每曆年累積十五天有薪特休假。

all.en: An additional five sick days are provided separately from annual leave.
all.zh: 另額外提供五天病假，與特休假分開計算。

all.en: Public holidays follow the official government calendar each year.
all.zh: 國定假日依當年政府公告的官方行事曆。

all.en: Personal days may be requested for unforeseen matters with advance notice.
all.zh: 如遇突發事項，可預先告知後申請個人事假。

all.en: Compensation reviews are conducted formally once each calendar year.
all.zh: 薪酬檢視每曆年正式進行一次。

all.en: Performance evaluations occur at six-month intervals throughout the year.
all.zh: 績效評估於每年以六個月為週期進行。

all.en: Professional development funds are available for courses and conferences.
all.zh: 課程與研討會可申請專業發展經費。

all.en: Each employee may use up to two thousand US dollars annually for learning.
all.zh: 每位員工每年最多可動支兩千美元用於學習。

all.en: All employees must complete mandatory compliance training each year.
all.zh: 所有員工每年須完成強制性的法遵訓練。

all.en: Use of company equipment must comply with our acceptable use policy.
all.zh: 使用公司設備須符合本公司的可接受使用政策。

all.en: Confidential information should never be shared outside authorized channels.
all.zh: 機密資訊絕不可透過未經授權管道外洩。

all.en: Dress is business casual on most days and smart business for client meetings.
all.zh: 大多數日子為商務休閒裝，客戶會議則為正式商務裝。

all.en: Pets are not permitted in the office except for service animals.
all.zh: 辦公室內不得攜帶寵物，但服務型動物不在此限。

all.en: Suggestions for handbook improvements are welcomed at any time.
all.zh: 歡迎隨時提出改善手冊的建議。

all.en: Updates will be published quarterly and notified through internal email.
all.zh: 更新將每季發布並透過內部電子郵件通知。

all.en: Acknowledgment of receipt is required within thirty days of your start date.
all.zh: 請於到職日起三十天內簽署收到確認。

all.en: Please direct any questions to your manager or the people operations team.
all.zh: 如有疑問，請洽您的主管或人員營運團隊。

all.en: New hires also receive a thirty-day onboarding plan tailored to their role.
all.zh: 新進人員另會收到依職務量身打造的三十天到職計畫。

all.en: Mentors are assigned to assist with cultural and procedural questions.
all.zh: 公司會指派導師協助文化與流程相關疑問。

all.en: Health insurance enrollment must be completed within the first two weeks.
all.zh: 健康保險投保須於到職前兩週內完成。

all.en: Retirement plan contributions begin on the first of the following month.
all.zh: 退休金提撥自次月一日起開始。

all.en: Employees may participate in the stock purchase program after six months.
all.zh: 員工於任職滿六個月後可參加員工認股方案。

all.en: Internal job postings are circulated weekly through the talent portal.
all.zh: 內部職缺每週透過人才入口網站公告。

all.en: Transfers between departments require approval from both reporting managers.
all.zh: 跨部門調動須取得雙方主管核可。

all.en: Grievances should be raised through the formal channels outlined in section twelve.
all.zh: 申訴事項應依第十二章所列正式管道提出。

all.en: Exit interviews are scheduled to gather feedback when employment concludes.
all.zh: 離職面談於結束聘僱時安排，以蒐集回饋意見。

all.en: Thank you for taking the time to understand our shared standards and values.
all.zh: 感謝您撥冗了解我們共同遵循的標準與價值。
